name: Hooper, Lillian
motto: "A lovely damsel, modest and fair."
description: Peculiarity—Her voice ever soft, gentle, and low. Destiny—To be determined.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Mashburn, E. E.
motto: "To be or not to be."
description: Hobby—Military fiend.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Holland, W. C.
motto: "A wise son maketh a glad father, but frequent calls for money raiseth a row."
description: Peculiarity—Little, but O my! Ambition—Assistant to T. A. Collins.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Sadler, D. K.
motto: "I'm the very pink of courtesy."
description: Peculiarity—Wisdom and plenty of words to tell it. Ambition—Ambassador to Germany.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Stanford, J. B.
motto: "Needles and pins, needles and pins, When a man marries his trouble begins."
description: Peculiarity—Too many to mention. Destiny—Missionary to the Philippines.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Cubage, J. G.
motto: "Pretty, but not old enough to go with the girls."
description: Peculiarity—Bombast. Destiny—A politician if his health will permit.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Andrix, E. R.
motto: "How bright, how strong, in youth's untroubled hour."
description: Peculiarity—Brevity. Destiny—Inventor.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Wilson, C. P.
motto: "Man, proud man, dressed in a little brief authority."
description: Peculiarity—Vanity! Vanity! Vanity! Destiny—Farmer.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Pope, A. D.
motto: "Variety is the spice of life."
description: Peculiarity—Timidity. Ambition—Supreme Bench.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Barrett, F. B.
motto: "Right man in the right place."
description: Hobby—Tending to his own business. Ambition—To bridge the Atlantic.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Foreman, C. D.
motto: "Silent as night."
description: Peculiarity—Laziness. Ambition—Horticulturist.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Stone, J. H.
motto: "Only in the world to fill up a place."
description: Peculiarity—Feminine-like beauty. Specialty—Fudge-making.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Johnson, Mabelle
motto: "A graceful ease, and sweetness void of pride."
description: Peculiarity—"Not like other girls." Destiny—A writer of books.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Davis, Barbara
motto: "Musicians are born, not made."
description: Peculiarity—Meekness and plumpness. Destiny—Sappho the II.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_04.png

name: James, J. J.
motto: "I care for no one, no not I, If no one cares for me."
description: Peculiarity—"I do love my cigarette." Hobby—Greek fiend.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Payne, Brodie
motto: "I am Sir Oracle, and when I open my lips let no dog bark."
description: Hobby—Writing poetry. Specialty—Harper’s Magazine.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Schimmelpfenning, C. W.
motto: "He was a man after God's own heart."
description: Peculiarity—Only the name. Destiny—City engineer, Little Rock.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Pruett, J. R.
motto: "He thinks too much. Such men are dangerous."
description: Hobby—Examinations. Destiny—First assistant engineer to His Satanic Majesty.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_05.png

name: McCrory, G. G.
motto: "He used to tell me, in his boastful way, How he had broke the hearts of pretty girls."
description: Peculiarity—Brevity. Destiny—First assistant engineer in the construction of Panama Canal.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Oates, C. E.
motto: "A tall lean gentleman, by heavens!"
description: Peculiarity—Enthusiasm. Destiny—Teacher of Sleepy Hollow School.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Nordmeyer, C. D.
motto: "The noblest mind the best contentment has."
description: Hobby—Admirer of Roosevelt and Booker T. Washington. Destiny—Going West and grow up with my party. (Republican.)
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Leverette, S.
motto: "Prompt, decisive, no breath he wasted."
description: Hobby—Fire Brigade. Destiny—Organizer of "The Goldmine Trust."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Brunskog, C. W.
motto: "How far that little candle throws its beams."
description: Peculiarity—Always content. Motto—Never fearful of trying.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Blackshire, P. L.
motto: "An engineer after Prof. Knoch's own heart."
description: Peculiarity—Long-winded. Destiny—Engineer always.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Van Valkenburgh, W. M.
motto: "A noble duke, my lord."
description: Characteristic—Energy. Ambition—Mayor of Warren.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Winters, W. L.
motto: "His sweet smile haunts me still."
description: Peculiarity—Beauty?? Destiny—Chief Engineer of the Illinois Central System.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Ballard, B. C.
motto: "A Stoic of the woods—a man without a tear."
description: Specialty—Being a gentleman and working for Dr. Johnson. Destiny—Professor.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Droke, Leila
motto: "I hear, but say not much."
description: Destiny—Unknown.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Jacks, M. E.
motto: "If he be not in love with some woman, There is no believing in old signs."
description: Favorite Study — Profs Purdue and Steel. Destiny—Too difficult a problem.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Keeney, Gussie
motto: "A child of her grandmother Eve."
description: Peculiarity — "A face with gladness overspread." Destiny—Matrimony.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Tockton, Irene
motto: "Is she not passing fair?"
description: Peculiarity—Beauty. Destiny—Old maid.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Wilson, Nellie
motto: "Gentle, unpretentious, calm and mild."
description: Favorite study—“Deutsch.” Destiny—Prophetess.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Johnston, J. H.
motto: "’Tis better to have loved and lost, than to have married and been bossed."
description: Peculiarity—Absentmindedness. Destiny—Always to be behind times.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Weber, L. W.
motto: "He loves to study lessons; his answers are always right."
description: Hobby—Euthanasian theory. Destiny—A bookworm.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Brockman, E. W.
motto: "President of the Senior Class."
description: Hobby—Ardent disciple of Mr. De Loney in his doctrine of “The Universal Brotherhood of Man.” Ambition—Back to the Farm.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Hurst, G. A.
motto: "I am Monarch of all I survey."
description: Peculiarity—Eloquence. Can’t help it. Destiny—Statesman, understood.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Croom, C. W.
motto: "A man with many disappointments."
description: Peculiarity—Modesty. Destiny—Leader of men.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Collins, T. A.
motto: "Greater men than I may have lived, but I don't believe it."
description: Ambition—Political boss.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Pruett, G. C.
motto: "His waist is larger than his life, For life is but a span."
description: Peculiarity—Physical frailty.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Mullins, T. C.
motto: "How bright, how strong, in youth's untroubled hour:"
description: Peculiarity—Math. eater. Destiny—Architect.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Campbell, L. L.
description: The missing link in the evolution theory. Peculiarity—Power of prevarication. Ambition—Bung-hole orator of the universe.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Harding, C. T.
motto: "When I was a child, I did as a child; but since I have become a man, I am an Engineer."
description: Peculiarity—Calculus fiend (?). Ambition—Chief engineer on the Grand Trunk Railway to Mars.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Craig, P. G.
motto: "O for knowledge vast; of learning most profound; And, best of all, a kind and courteous gentleman."
description: Favorite studies—German and more German. Destiny—Not short of the President's Cabinet.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Gardner, J. W.
motto: "A Lion among ladies."
description: Favorite study—(?) Destiny—Elysian field.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_11.png

name: DeLONEY, E. D.
motto: "I Awoke one morning and found myself famous."
description: Favorite book--"Is the Negro a Beast?" Ambition--To solve the race problem.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Borders, J. M.
motto: "Nature found but one such man, And broke the die in moulding BORDERS."
description: Peculiarity--Changes with the wind. Destiny--Farmer, if not something else.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Dalton, C. E.
motto: "As some cold mountain cold and bleak, He stands a solitary peak."
description: Peculiarity-A man of few words. Ambition-C. E.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Prattt, D. H.
motto: "A little learning is a dangerous thing."
description: Hobby-Anarchy, Socialism, Agnosticism. Destiny-Reformer.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Mock, Bird
motto: "Though the last to join our class, we welcome thee, my lass"
description: Peculiarity--Always informed as to the latest. Specialities--B. A., M. A. and B. M.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Mesler, R. D.
motto: "A youth to fortune and to fame unknown."
description: Hobby--Fossil hunting. Destiny--To succeed Pluto in his reign.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Austin, E. L.
motto: "On his bold visage middle age Had slightly passed his signet sage."
description: Hobby--Military fiend. Destiny--Geologist.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Catts, E. C.
motto: "Long live the 'Cat', who has seven lives."
description: Peculiarity--Biggest grafter in the Varsity. Destiny--Naval Engineer.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Tabor, H. B.
motto: "Truly a Ladies' pet, I know it by his style."
description: Peculiarity--Dignity. Ambition--U. S. Supreme Court.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Hunt, H. G.
motto: "Whose mouth is so large he can whisper in his own ear."
description: Hobby--Drill. Destiny--Automatic encylopedia for Colunbia University.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1906.pdf_页面_12.png
